mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.shop_id, p.category_id, p.name, p.image_url, p.description, p.detail, p.price, p.original_price, p.stock, p.status, p.recommended, p.deleted, p.version, p.create_time, p.update_time FROM product p INNER JOIN category c ON c.id = p.category_id AND c.shop_id = p.shop_id AND c.status = 1 AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE p.shop_id = #{shopId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status IN (1, 2)
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.recommended DESC, p.id DESC
